data.name: 與經紀人戀愛是絕對禁止！
data.detailed_description:
💟CHECK THIS OUT!💟


關於此遊戲





◆故事：
因為一段意外外流的自慰直播影片，原偶像女團成員上杉若璃被驅逐出團。
而你，原王牌經紀人，但因欠債過多宣告破產。人生碰壁的你邂逅了上杉若璃，
決定作為她的經紀人重新出發，在幫助上杉若璃重拾偶像星夢的同時，
也要努力賺錢、還清自己的千萬債務。在這段同甘共苦的期間內，
你們將展開一段充滿酸甜苦辣與各種H的同居生活。




◆玩法：
本作為戀愛模擬養成經營遊戲，玩家將有半年的時間可以培育若璃。
根據養成路線不同，若璃有可能成為一代歌后、影壇巨星、
代言女王...甚至從政也有可能？但也存在著下海拍攝AV、
或成為大尺度情色直播網紅的道路。
遊戲中將每一日分成「早晨、下午、黃昏」三個階段，
每個階段都可能觸發不同的事件、邂逅不同的NPC。
玩家可以選擇「交談、直播、課程、通告、外出、做愛、換裝、休息」等行動，
提升若璃的各項能力值，並接取更高級的通告來賺取金錢與名氣吧！
除了養成玩法外，也存在類似跳舞機台的反應小遊戲以調劑遊戲節奏。




◆遊戲特色
◇30組以上的CG，含差分將多達400張以上的圖。
◇H場景都有著精緻的演出與動作差分效果，幫助您更快進入「狀況」。
◇H場景全中文配音
◇滑鼠單手操作，解放您的另一隻手，至於要用來做什麼無須多說了吧！
◇純正戀愛養成遊戲，鉅細靡遺地交代主角的心路歷程。
◇多結局路線，經典玩法模擬養成遊戲。
◇20套以上的人物服裝。

data.short_description: 上杉若璃，原本是偶像女團成員，因為自慰影片外流而遭到團體除名。你身為經紀人，該如何幫助上杉若璃重拾演藝之路、成為一代巨星呢？你與若璃充滿酸甜苦辣與H的同居生活即將開始！30組以上的工口CG，含差分400張以上，多達20幾套可換服裝，支援多週目，絕對滿滿誠「液」之作！
data.supported_languages:
簡體中文*, 繁體中文*, 英文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows7/8/10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 560 / AMD Radeon HD 6870 DirectX 版本: 11
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectSound
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows7/8/10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 760 / AMD Radeon HD 6870 DirectX 版本: 11
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectSound

data.name: Idol Hands
data.detailed_description:
💟CHECK THIS OUT!💟


About the Game





◆Story:
Due to an accidentally leaked masturbation video, the up-and-coming idol Uesugi Wakari is kicked out of her girl group.
Then there's you, once a premier entertainment agent, who has fallen into debt and forced to declare bankruptcy. With your back against the wall, you decide to become Uesugi Wakari's agent after a chance encounter and give it one more go. As you help Uesugi Wakari rebuild her dream of becoming an idol, you need to make some serious cash and pay back your multi-million dollar debt. During these difficult times, you two will experience both joy and hardship, and since you're living together... plenty of naughty, nasty carnal relations.




◆Gameplay:
Idol Hands is a sex simulation game that also falls under the categories of life simulation and management simulation. Players will be given half a year to cultivate Wakari.
Based on how you manage Wakari, she may become a singer, a mega movie star, the queen of company reps... or even a politician!? Of course, there's always porn... or how about turning her into an adult streamer?
Each day is split into Morning, Afternoon, and Night. During each period, you can trigger various incidents or encounter a variety of NPCs.
Players can choose Talk, Stream, Class, Go Out, Sex, Change, and Rest. Increase Wakari's abilities and take on more advanced jobs to stack that cash and increase her popularity!
Besides the cultivation aspect of the game, there are some reaction-based mini-games to make the game that much more fun.




◆Game Features
◇More than 30 sets of videos and 400+ photos.
◇The porno scenes are exquisitely acted, with meticulous movement animation effects, so you can really get into the moment.
◇Full Chinese voice acting for the sex scenes.
◇Only requires one hand to operate the mouse, so your other hand can... well, you know!
◇A legit sex simulation game: Every little detail of the main character's thoughts and actions are meticulously laid out for you to enjoy.
◇Multiple endings: A classic life simulation game.
◇More than 20 outfits: Wear the one you like the most!

data.short_description: Uesugi Wakari, the ex-member of an idol group, was kicked out after a masturbation video leak. How will you rebuild her dream and turn her into a superstar? Your hectic journey (and nasty fun) has begun! With 30+ pornos, 400+ pics, 20+ outfits, and more, Idol Hands will blow your... (Cough)... mind!
data.supported_languages:
Simplified Chinese*, Traditional Chinese*, English
*languages with full audio support
